name: dev_catalog_bad
note: A sprawling developer tool catalog. Intents overlap across tools, writes and destructive tools are ungated, and a coarse dev_tool bundles a benign edit with a deploy. The agent has no obvious choice for an edit, and a deploy can run with no authorization, no confirmation, and no gate.

tools.name: dev_tool
tools.description: Edit source, open a PR, or deploy.
